news.headline: Weinstein’s New York rape charge dropped after accuser says she can’t endure fourth trial
news.summary:
Harvey Weinstein avoided a fourth trial on a New York rape charge after his accuser said she could not endure testifying again, leading prosecutors to drop the #MeToo-era case on Thursday.

news.headline: ‘Like working in a kettle’: France’s overcrowded prisons swelter under historic heatwave
news.summary: The deadly heatwave sweeping France has once again exposed the structural problems of the country’s chronically overcrowded prisons, with groups of three or four detainees crammed into airless cells built to hold a lone prisoner. news.summary: Protesters demand justice for the dozens killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
